sourceTitle: Utiliser l'intelligence artificielle dans sa recherche : des recommandations pour le respect de l'intégrité scientifique
verificationNotes: Official PDF-like print guidance from BU Paris-Dauphine (PSL member school library). Provides recommendations for responsible AI use in research context. Covers transparency, responsibility, data privacy, and limitations. This is member-school guidance, not PSL central administration policy.
